title: deep-work session-receipt payload v1.0
description: Authoritative payload schema for deep-work session-receipt envelope (artifact_kind=session-receipt, schema.version=1.0). Mirrors deep-work v6.5.0+ emit shape from Phase 2 envelope adoption. parent_run_id chains to upstream deep-evolve evolve-insights when the session consumed evolve outputs in its research phase.

schema_version.description: Payload-internal schema version (independent from envelope schema_version).

canonical.description: True when this receipt is the canonical session-level aggregate (not a slice or replay).

derived_from.description: Glob or path describing what the receipt was synthesized from (e.g., 'receipts/SLICE-*.json').

phase.description: Current/last phase reached (e.g., brainstorm, research, plan, implement, test, integrate).

outcome_ref.description: Optional reference (PR URL, commit SHA, branch) tied to the outcome.
